warning_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
prompt:
A realistic, high-resolution sharp studio product photograph, even lighting, straight-on, white background of a ipa bottle whose front label uses a hand-drawn botanical design. The label clearly shows, as crisp legible text:
- Brand name: "Old Tom Throw"
- Product type: "India Pale Ale"
- Alcohol content: "5% Alc./Vol."
- Net contents: "750 mL"
On the back/lower portion of the label, in small but legible print, include this exact government warning text verbatim:
"GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems."
Spell all text exactly as written. The label should look like a genuine commercial product, not a mockup or template. No extra captions or borders.
